cases.name: example_real_issue_case
cases.task_input: Fix the behavior described in the linked issue while keeping the diff minimal.
cases.issue_text: Paste the issue body or the failing-test description here. Include stack traces, expected behavior, and relevant symbols when available.
cases.test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_specific_failure.py b/tests/test_specific_failure.py
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_specific_failure.py
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+from package.module import function
+
+
+def test_regression_behavior():
+    assert function('input') == 'expected'
